sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113416" key="xaritw/sios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαρῐτ-ώσιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n113416.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">χαριτήσιος</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ibyc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">51</biblScope> </bibl> (Rhegine, acc. to Sch.D.T.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.542</biblScope> </bibl> H.).</sense> </entryFree>
